docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00** SERVED FEB-16-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ACE ROOFING S.F. , INC.
